location.name: Pico Ruivo
location.summary: Madeira’s highest peak, reached by mountain trails with expansive views in clear weather.
location.imageAlt: Mountain ridge near Pico Ruivo in Madeira

article.intro: Pico Ruivo is Madeira’s highest summit and a major goal for hikers visiting the island’s central mountains.
article.history: The peak has long been connected by highland paths, with routes from Achada do Teixeira and the Pico do Arieiro area.
highlights: Wide views in stable, clear weather
article.practicalTip: Always check official trail status and mountain conditions before setting out.
